F4 Word in rule 6.4(c) substituted for full stop (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 7(b) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


F5 Rule 6.4(d) inserted (6.4.2022) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2022 (S.I. 2022/44) , rules 1(3)(a) , 7(c) (with rule 29 ); S.I. 2022/283 , reg. 2


F6 Words in rule 6.4 inserted (13.1.2025) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2024 (S.I. 2024/1016) , rules 1(3)(b) , 3(1)


### Who is to serve the application E+W


6.5. —(1) Subject to the provisions of this rule, an application may be served by—


[ F9 (2) A court officer will not serve the application if the party to be served is—


(3) An application must not be served personally by the applicant himself or herself. (Rule 6.14 deals with service of the application on children and protected parties.)
